headline: Better Stock To Buy In 2026: Costco or Walmart
summary: Walmart (NASDAQ:WMT) reported a strong fourth quarter, capping a year defined by digital acceleration and advertising growth. Costco (NASDAQ:COST) followed in early March with results that reinforced its membership flywheel. Both are winning in the same consumer environment. The question is which model holds more upside. Two Very Different Machines Firing at the Same Time ... Better Stock To Buy In 2026: Costco or Walmart
